summary: Iteration 140: Quick Create Client Modal + PDF Perizia Improvements - ALL TESTS PASS (14 backend + 6 frontend). Tested: (1) Quick Create Client modal in Sopralluogo Wizard step 0 with '+ Nuovo' button, form fields, and save button disabled state, (2) PDF smart pricing with 'Da Quotare' for zero prices, (3) PDF 2x2 photo grid without empty placeholders, (4) PDF 'RELAZIONE TECNICA DI SOPRALLUOGO' header bar, (5) Client API accepts minimal payload.

quick_create_client_modal.nuovo_button: PASS - Button with data-testid='btn-quick-create-client' visible next to client dropdown
quick_create_client_modal.modal_opens: PASS - Modal with data-testid='client-quick-create-modal' opens on click
quick_create_client_modal.save_button: PASS - data-testid='quick-client-save' disabled when name empty, enabled when name filled

pdf_smart_pricing.all_zero_prices: PASS - Shows 'Da Quotare' for all items, no total row
pdf_smart_pricing.all_positive_prices: PASS - Shows normal pricing with TOTALE MATERIALI row
pdf_smart_pricing.mixed_prices: PASS - Zero items show 'Da Quotare', priced items show amounts, total only includes priced

pdf_photo_grid.odd_3_photos: PASS - Last row has 1 photo card without empty placeholder
pdf_photo_grid.odd_5_photos: PASS - Last row has 1 photo card without empty placeholder
pdf_photo_grid.even_4_photos: PASS - Two rows with 2 photos each
pdf_photo_grid.single_photo: PASS - Single row with 1 photo card

pdf_content_header.header_bar: PASS - 'RELAZIONE TECNICA DI SOPRALLUOGO' in content-header-title

client_api_minimal_payload.business_name_only: PASS - POST /api/clients/ accepts minimal payload, client_type defaults to 'cliente'
client_api_minimal_payload.with_optional_fields: PASS - Accepts address, phone, email optional fields
client_api_minimal_payload.missing_business_name: PASS - Returns 422 validation error when business_name missing

critical_code_review_comments: ClientQuickCreateModal.js correctly uses apiRequest with minimal payload (business_name + client_type)
PDF smart pricing logic at line ~532-547 correctly handles: prezzo=0 → 'Da Quotare', prezzo>0 → formatted EUR
PDF photo grid at line ~443-445 correctly builds rows of 2 without empty placeholder divs
PDF content header at line ~619 contains 'Relazione Tecnica di Sopralluogo' text
Client model accepts business_name as only required field with client_type defaulting to 'cliente'
test_credentials: Session token created via mongosh for UI testing
seed_data_creation: None - tests use mock data and cleanup test clients
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 140 verifies the Quick Create Client modal in Sopralluogo Wizard and PDF improvements. The modal is at /app/frontend/src/components/ClientQuickCreateModal.js and integrated at line ~355-362 of SopralluogoWizardPage.js. PDF pricing logic (Da Quotare) is in pdf_perizia_sopralluogo.py lines 532-559. Photo grid logic at lines 433-451. Content header at line 617-621.
